mapper.sql: select line_name, stop_name, stop_order, direction, stop_type, first_bus_time, last_bus_time from dim_route_station_details
mapper.select: SELECT r.line_name as lineName, r.stop_name as stopName, r.stop_order as stopOrder, r.direction, r.stop_type as stopType, r.first_bus_time as firstBusTime, r.last_bus_time as lastBusTime, s.longitude, s.latitude, s.zone_type as zoneType FROM dim_route_station_details r LEFT JOIN dim_stops s ON r.stop_name = s.stop_name WHERE r.line_name = #{lineName} ORDER BY r.stop_order

WITH station_coords AS ( SELECT r.stop_name as stopName, r.stop_order as stopOrder, s.longitude, s.latitude, lag(s.longitude) OVER (ORDER BY r.stop_order) as prevLongitude, lag(s.latitude) OVER (ORDER BY r.stop_order) as prevLatitude FROM dim_route_station_details r LEFT JOIN dim_stops s ON r.stop_name = s.stop_name WHERE r.line_name = #{lineName} ) SELECT stopName, stopOrder, longitude, latitude, CASE WHEN prevLongitude IS NOT NULL AND prevLatitude IS NOT NULL THEN round(6371 * acos(cos(radians(latitude)) * cos(radians(prevLatitude)) * cos(radians(longitude) - radians(prevLongitude)) + sin(radians(latitude)) * sin(radians(prevLatitude))), 2) ELSE 0 END as distanceKm FROM station_coords ORDER BY stopOrder

SELECT r.stop_name as stopName, r.first_bus_time as firstBusTime, r.last_bus_time as lastBusTime, SUM(CASE WHEN f.stat_hour BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count ELSE 0 END) as morningPeakFlow, SUM(CASE WHEN f.stat_hour BETWEEN 17 AND 19 THEN f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count ELSE 0 END) as eveningPeakFlow, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN f.stat_hour BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / NULLIF(SUM(f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count), 0) * 100 as morningPeakRate, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN f.stat_hour BETWEEN 17 AND 19 THEN f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / NULLIF(SUM(f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count), 0) * 100 as eveningPeakRate FROM dim_route_station_details r LEFT JOIN fact_station_flow f ON r.stop_name = f.stop_name AND r.line_name = f.line_name AND DATE(f.stat_time) = #{date} WHERE r.line_name = #{lineName} GROUP BY r.stop_name, r.first_bus_time, r.last_bus_time ORDER BY morningPeakRate DESC

SELECT r.stop_name as stopName, COUNT(DISTINCT r.line_name) as lineCount, SUM(f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count) as totalFlow, AVG(f.load_factor) as avgLoadFactor, MAX(f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count) as maxHourlyFlow FROM dim_route_station_details r LEFT JOIN fact_station_flow f ON r.stop_name = f.stop_name AND r.line_name = f.line_name WHERE r.stop_name = #{stopName} GROUP BY r.stop_name
